disallowed_items.reason: Do not include any opening/closing statements on Xactimate estimate

disallowed_items.description: Depreciation should not be added by contractors
disallowed_items.reason: Contractors should not be adding depreciation to the repair estimate. Claim Reps will add this

disallowed_items.description: Deductibles should not be added by contractors
disallowed_items.reason: Contractors should not add the deductible on the Xactimate estimate. Claim Rep will add this

disallowed_items.description: Travel charges should not be included
disallowed_items.reason: Estimate should not include any line items relating to contractor travel charges
Do not include Administrator charges within the estimate

disallowed_items.description: Inspection/estimate fees not allowed in estimate
disallowed_items.reason: Do not include any fees associated with the inspection or preparation of the estimate

disallowed_items.description: Credit items should not be included
disallowed_items.reason: Credit items (negative line items) should not be included in the Xactimate estimate

disallowed_items.description: LAB SUPERR generally not needed for residential jobs
disallowed_items.reason: Generally, LAB SUPERR is not needed or applicable for most residential jobs. Thorough explanation required if estimated

quantity_limits.description: Waste should not be added except for specific items
quantity_limits.reason: Should not be added to Xactimate price list items except for: Carpet, Vinyl sheet goods, Roofing shingles

quantity_limits.description: Labor minimums only for non-overlapping trades
quantity_limits.reason: Labor minimum charges should be applied only for trades that do not overlap and a separate tradesperson is needed

methodology_restrictions.description: Hourly charges only in extenuating circumstances
methodology_restrictions.reason: Hourly Charges should only be used in extenuating circumstances. Should only be estimated if a specific line item entry for that operation does not exist. A line item note (F9) is required to explain any LAB items

methodology_restrictions.description: Do not estimate detach and reset floor registers
methodology_restrictions.reason: Estimate should not include to detach and reset floor registers - this activity is included in the labor for flooring replacement. Also line 1004-1005: do not include to detach and reset flooring registers

methodology_restrictions.description: CLN FINALR only for complete home gut/new construction
methodology_restrictions.reason: Per Xactimate, CLN FINALR is intended only for final cleaning of a complete home and generally associated with a complete gut or new construction. Cleaning of the workspace by each trade is part of labor

methodology_restrictions.description: High/Premium quality items must be documented
methodology_restrictions.reason: High/Premium grade materials must be documented with a line item note (F9) and photos

methodology_restrictions.description: Drop cloths and scaffolding are tools of the trade
methodology_restrictions.reason: Do not estimate for drop cloths and scaffolding as these are tools of the trade. Extra masking should not be estimated for most paint and drywall activities

overhead_profit_restrictions.reason: No O&P on the following services: Emergency Services (tarp, temp roof repairs, mitigation), Content Cleaning and Restoration, Licensing, Permit Fees

overhead_profit_restrictions.description: O&P not applicable on non-complex repairs
overhead_profit_restrictions.reason: O&P is not applicable on non-complex repairs/losses. Based on repair complexity, participation of additional trades, coordination and scheduling efforts

flooring.description: Do not detach/reset door slabs with flooring
flooring.reason: Do not estimate detaching and resetting door slabs in conjunction with the repairs of flooring. Do not use DOR DOR-R in conjunction with estimating replacement of flooring

drywall.reason: DRY PATCH should be used in an estimate when the damage is limited to less than 4SF. It may be appropriate to have more than one DRY PATCH entry in an estimate

painting.reason: Estimate PNT SP (Seal/Prime and then paint one finish coat) for new drywall on entire walls or entire ceiling. For repairs: seal/prime repaired area 1' larger on all sides, then finish paint entire surface one coat

painting.description: Do not remove light fixtures for painting
painting.reason: Do not estimate to remove light fixtures, detaching cover plates and minor content manipulation separately when estimating to paint walls or ceilings. These activities are generally included in the price assemblies

notes: These rules are extracted from the official State Farm GC Program guidelines
All rules require F9 line item notes when exceptions apply
Photos required for premium materials, high-grade items, and deviations from guidelines
Contact claim handler for any unusual circumstances or coverage questions
Guidelines updated: 2026-02-15 from STATE FARM – GC PROGRAM.txt
